description.value:
A vial of thoroughly filtered Laublub oil, pale and clear. Safe for Delta Kilo Autarchs to consume as lubricant.

Drink

Target a creature and choose how many charges to feed it (Consumption Scaling). Each charge consumed restores 1 hour to the target's fluid gauge, up to the 48-hour cap. Only meaningful if the target is a Delta Kilo Autarch; excess beyond the cap is wasted.

Douse

Pour charges onto the ground to coat the area with oil (radius scales with charges spent: 1 charge = 2.5 ft radius, 2 = 3.75 ft, 3 = 5 ft). Any creature entering or starting its turn there must succeed on a DC 10 + the douser's Dexterity modifier Dexterity saving throw or fall prone (and take 1d8 fire damage if the oil has been ignited; standing up requires the same save). The oil evaporates after 1 minute. Igniting is GM adjudicated and grants a one-time +4 bonus to the triggering fire damage.

Throw

Ranged attack roll against a creature or object. On a hit, the target is coated in oil for 48 rounds. At the start of its turn, the target may spend its action and succeed on a DC 10 Dexterity saving throw to reduce the remaining duration by 5 rounds. Igniting (GM adjudicated) grants a one-time +4 bonus to the triggering fire damage; the oil then continues burning until the end of the target's next turn, dealing an additional 1d8 fire damage at the start of that turn (use the Douse - Continued Burn Damage activity).

description.chatFlavor: Each charge fed to the target restores 1 hour to their fluid gauge (handled via module socket; GM client applies the update).
Failure: fall prone. Fire damage applies to anyone in the area once ignited (GM adjudicated), regardless of save result. Standing up requires the same save. Oil evaporates after 1 minute.

On a hit, the target is coated in oil for 48 rounds (Gefiltert). Wipe off with DC 10 Dexterity save as an action (reduces remaining duration by 5 rounds). Igniting (GM adjudicated) grants a one-time +4 bonus to triggering fire damage, then continues burning until the end of the target's next turn (use Douse - Continued Burn Damage for the follow-up 1d8).
One-time follow-up damage at the start of the target's next turn after ignition (Gefiltert only).
